name: viz-gateway
description: Federated multisig gateway between VIZ and remote chains (TON, Solana, ...): lock VIZ, mint wrapped VIZ.

scripts.verify: node tools/threshold-calc.mjs && node tools/viz-multisig-spike.cjs && node tools/ton-notification-spike.cjs && node tools/writepaths-spike.cjs && node tools/orchestration-spike.cjs && node tools/rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/ton-rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-writepath-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-orchestration-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-innerix-spike.cjs && node tools/outbox-spike.cjs && node tools/dispatcher-policy-spike.cjs && node tools/fee-viz-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-address-spike.cjs && node tools/lookup-validate-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-guard-spike.cjs && node tools/signer-f2-spike.cjs && node tools/ton-pegout-f2-spike.cjs && node tools/fee-sweep-refund-spike.cjs && node tools/idempotent-delivery-spike.cjs && node contracts/ton/tools/verify-offline.cjs && node tools/e2e-config-spike.cjs && node tools/deposit-pda-spike.cjs && node tools/ton-onchain-approval-spike.cjs
scripts.e2e:ton: npm run build && node tools/e2e/dist/roundtrip.js ton
scripts.e2e:federation: npm run build && env $(grep -v '^#' .env.e2e | xargs) node tools/e2e/dist/federation.js
